user_query:
I'm organizing material from my weekly Bio‑Utopia Salon to keep the book project on track. Please use the local inputs below to produce a consolidated summary, analytics, and a cleaned preface rewrite.

Inputs (read-only):
- input/notes/2026-03-05_salonsession.md
- input/notes/2026-03-12_salonsession.md
- input/notes/2026-03-19_salonsession.md
- input/draft_preface.md
- input/keywords.json

Requirements:
1) Produce a consolidated summary at output/combined_summary.md with four clearly labeled sections:
   - Overview: include (a) date range covered, (b) total number of sessions summarized, (c) average duration in minutes (rounded to the nearest minute), (d) total number of unique attendees and an alphabetical list of their names.
   - Key Decisions: list decisions grouped by session date, preserving the language in the notes where practical.
   - Action Items by Owner: group all action items across sessions by owner name; under each owner, list their items (with the session date) and include a count of items per owner.
   - Keyword Frequencies: include a simple list summarizing the total counts for each keyword phrase from input/keywords.json across all sessions (case-insensitive matching of the full phrase as written in the JSON).

2) Compute and save a per-session analytics table at output/meeting_stats.csv with columns in this exact order:
   meeting_file,date,duration_minutes,attendee_count,decision_count,action_item_count
   One row per input/notes/*.md file.

3) Compute and save aggregate keyword totals at output/keyword_counts.csv with columns in this exact order:
   keyword,total_count
   Use input/keywords.json as the source of phrases to count and count case-insensitive occurrences of each full phrase across all three notes combined.

4) Edit the existing preface by producing a rewritten version at output/preface_rewrite.md derived from input/draft_preface.md. Keep the original title line(s), remove all TODO lines, and replace placeholders with concrete prose that reflects the salon outcomes. The rewritten preface must:
   - Explicitly quote the agreed framing triad "bio-abundance, equity, governance" once.
   - Include one short paragraph (3–5 sentences) that weaves together CRISPR-enabled public health cooperatives, open-source synthetic biology, community biomanufacturing and the broader bioeconomy, longevity, and governance, grounded in the notes.
   - Avoid introducing external sources or claims not present in the notes; stay consistent with decisions and action items.

Notes:
- Do not modify any files under input/.
- All outputs must be created under output/ using the exact paths above.
- Ensure counts and aggregates are computed from the provided files so results are reproducible locally. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
